entities.name: ORANGE-FLESHED SWEETPOTATO
entities.description: A biofortified sweetpotato variety rich in pro-vitamin A and iron developed for Sub-Saharan Africa

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The geographic region where nutrient deficiencies are prevalent and breeding efforts are focused

entities.name: VITAMIN A DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A nutritional deficiency affecting children under 5 years old in Sub-Saharan Africa

entities.name: IRON DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A nutritional deficiency affecting children under 5 years old in Sub-Saharan Africa

entities.name: PRO-VITAMIN A CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of pro-vitamin A in the sweetpotato root

entities.name: IRON CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of iron in the sweetpotato root

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to maintain productivity and survive under water-limited conditions

entities.name: INTEGRATED CROP MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A holistic approach to crop production practices used to increase and sustain sweetpotato yields

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The global phenomenon increasing the frequency and severity of droughts

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A period of abnormally dry weather that stresses crop production

entities.name: ACCELERATED BREEDING SCHEME
entities.description: A breeding approach that reduced the breeding cycle from 8-10 to 4-5 years

entities.name: MOZAMBIQUE
entities.description: A country in Sub-Saharan Africa where drought-tolerant OFSP cultivars were released

entities.name: MALAWI
entities.description: A country in Sub-Saharan Africa where drought-tolerant OFSP cultivars were released

entities.name: SOUTH AFRICA
entities.description: A country in Sub-Saharan Africa where drought-tolerant OFSP cultivars were released

entities.name: HETEROSIS EXPLOITING BREEDING SCHEME
entities.description: A breeding scheme used to produce clones with higher root yield and abiotic tolerance

entities.name: ROOT YIELD
entities.description: The amount of edible root produced by the sweetpotato plant

entities.name: ABIOTIC TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to tolerate non-living environmental stressors

entities.name: PEST AND DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to resist biological attacks from pests and pathogens

entities.name: EARLY MATURITY
entities.description: The characteristic of reaching maturity in a short growing period of less than 4 months

entities.name: MODERN GENOMIC TOOLS
entities.description: Advanced molecular tools used to enhance breeding precision

entities.name: PHENOTYPING TOOLS
entities.description: Tools used to measure and analyze the physical characteristics of plants

entities.name: CRISPR/CAS9-MEDIATED GENE EDITING
entities.description: A precise gene editing technology used for crop improvement

entities.name: EARLY MATURING CULTIVARS
entities.description: A class of nutrient-rich cultivars that escape drought due to a short growing period

entities.name: MEDIUM MATURING CULTIVARS
entities.description: A class of nutrient-rich cultivars that avoid drought and exhibit continuous root formation
